description_long: This is a modern American-style police car, modeled after a four-door sedan with a black and white color scheme. The vehicle features prominent 'POLICE' lettering on both front doors, accompanied by 'SEACREST COUNTY' in smaller text below, and the number '911' on the rear quarter panels. A roof-mounted light bar with red and blue emergency lights sits atop the vehicle, while the front grille is equipped with a push bar. The car has standard black wheels, side mirrors, and visible door handles, with tinted windows and a detailed front grille. The rear of the car displays red tail lights and a subtle blue light, with no visible license plate.
description: A black and white police sedan with bold 'POLICE' markings, a roof-mounted red and blue light bar, and detailed emergency features.
description_view_0: Left side view showing 'POLICE SEACREST COUNTY' text, 911 marking, and the full roof light bar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the push bar, windshield, and the red and blue roof lights.
description_view_2: Right side view with mirrored 'POLICE SEACREST COUNTY' text, 911 marking, and clear view of the wheels and light bar.
description_view_3: Rear view showing red tail lights, a blue rear light, and the absence of a visible license plate.
attribute_police_markings: Large 'POLICE' text in black with a white outline is displayed on both front doors, with 'SEACREST COUNTY' in smaller, capitalized letters below. The number '911' is marked in white on the rear quarter panels. There is also a small American flag decal near the front fender.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red and blue rectangular lights is centered on the roof. Additional blue light is visible at the rear window.
